features: SHADOW SKILLS 4PC EYESHADOW BRUSH KIT: Create any eye look your heart desires with this professional eye brush set! Each expertly designed tool helps to create everyday and dramatic eye makeup looks with ease, from blending your shadows to lining and defining.

NO-SHED, VEGAN, HIGH BRISTLE-COUNT MAKEUP BRUSHES: Your makeup application is only as good as the quality of your brush. That's why you'll love this no-shed, high-bristle-count vegan brush that feels luxurious and blends seamlessly.
PAIRS PERFECTLY WITH THE ULTIMATE EYESHADOW PALETTE: When you combine this kit with Laura’s incredible Ultimate Palette, the possibilities are truly endless.
EFFORTLESSLY BLEND MAKEUP FOR SOFT-FOCUS FINISH: These versatile eyeshadow brushes does great with all powder formulas, seamlessly blending for a soft-focus finish.

HOW TO APPPLY: To use with The Ultimate Palette, use the Universal Eyeshadow Brush to apply shadows for your base, lid and inner/outer corner. You can also use it to apply your shimmer topper as a finishing touch. Use the Large Blending Brush to blend shadows together for a perfect finish. For extra definition, blend deeper shades into your crease using the Crease Brush. Last, use the Precision Liner Brush to line eyes along the upper and lower lashlines, as desired.
